name: Withdrawal edge
note_template: {char}'s craving for {substance} is clawing. Show it in temper and distraction, not exposition.

name: Seeking
note_template: Have {char} maneuver toward {substance} — an excuse, a detour, a small lie if it comes to that. Let the pull show in what they notice.

name: Temptation
note_template: Put {substance} within {char}'s reach at an inconvenient moment. Make refusing cost something visible.

name: Obsession grip
note_template: {char}'s fixation on {obs_target} is running the show now. Let it warp their choices, not just their thoughts.

name: Obsession pull
note_template: Thread {char}'s preoccupation with {obs_target} through the scene — glances, tangents, small tells.

name: Secret under pressure
note_template: Press on what {char} is hiding — a pointed question, a near-miss discovery. Let them almost slip.

name: Reversal
note_template: Turn the tables: hand momentary control to whoever has the least of it. Let it sting or thrill, then hold there.
